scene.description: An abstract isometric illustration depicting a central, dark blue 'T' shaped pillar, acting as a core, surrounded by a hexagonal arrangement of six interconnected, gradient-colored 3D cubes. The structure is further embellished with smaller blue cubes and dynamic, flowing lines and dots, suggesting data flow, connections, or modular systems against a dark background.

background.description: A deep, dark charcoal blue-black solid background.

elements.description: The central 'T' shaped pillar, a large isometric 3D structure.
elements.details: Composed of bright blue for the top surfaces, a medium blue for front faces, and a darker blue for shaded side faces. Forms the core of the arrangement.

elements.description: A small isometric blue cube placed directly on top of the central 'T' pillar.
elements.details: Part of the central blue structure, connecting upwards. Top face is brighter blue.

elements.description: A small isometric blue cube placed directly below the central 'T' pillar.
elements.details: Part of the central blue structure, connecting downwards. Top face is brighter blue.

elements.description: An isometric cube with an orange to pink gradient, positioned at the top-left of the central structure.
elements.details: Top face: orange to pink gradient (`#ffaa63` to `#ff5a80`). Front face: brighter orange to deep pink gradient (`#ff8c51` to `#ff2f74`). Right face: darker orange to purple-pink gradient (`#ee694e` to `#b02f66`).

elements.description: White outline of a short-sleeved t-shirt.
elements.details: Located on the top face of the top-left orange-pink cube.

elements.description: An isometric cube with an orange to pink gradient, positioned at the top-right of the central structure.
elements.details: Top face: orange to pink gradient (`#ffaa63` to `#ff5a80`). Front face: brighter orange to deep pink gradient (`#ff8c51` to `#ff2f74`). Left face: darker orange to purple-pink gradient (`#ee694e` to `#b02f66`).

elements.description: White outline of an open book.
elements.details: Located on the top face of the top-right orange-pink cube.

elements.description: An isometric cube with an orange to pink gradient, positioned at the bottom-right of the central structure.
elements.details: Top face: orange to pink gradient (`#ffaa63` to `#ff5a80`). Front face: brighter orange to deep pink gradient (`#ff8c51` to `#ff2f74`). Left face: darker orange to purple-pink gradient (`#ee694e` to `#b02f66`).

elements.description: White outline of a cogwheel (gear).
elements.details: Located on the top face of the bottom-right orange-pink cube.

elements.description: An isometric cube with a green to teal gradient, positioned at the bottom-left of the central structure.
elements.details: Top face: light green to teal gradient (`#7ed9a8` to `#4dd0bc`). Front face: medium green to medium teal gradient (`#5dbe9a` to `#2eb5b0`). Right face: darker green to darker teal gradient (`#449e7b` to `#24949b`).

elements.description: White outline of a beverage bottle.
elements.details: Located on the top face of the bottom-left green-teal cube.

elements.description: An isometric cube with a green to teal gradient, positioned to the left-center, behind the top-left orange cube.
elements.details: Top face: light green to teal gradient (`#7ed9a8` to `#4dd0bc`). Front face: medium green to medium teal gradient (`#5dbe9a` to `#2eb5b0`). Right face: darker green to darker teal gradient (`#449e7b` to `#24949b`).

elements.description: An isometric cube with a green to teal gradient, positioned to the right-center, behind the top-right orange cube.
elements.details: Top face: light green to teal gradient (`#7ed9a8` to `#4dd0bc`). Front face: medium green to medium teal gradient (`#5dbe9a` to `#2eb5b0`). Left face: darker green to darker teal gradient (`#449e7b` to `#24949b`).

elements.description: A triangular prism shape with an orange to pink gradient, acting as a connector between the upper-left orange cube and the central 'T' pillar.
elements.details: Its visible face shows a gradient from a muted orange to a deep pink.

elements.description: A triangular prism shape with a green to teal gradient, acting as a connector between the upper-right orange cube and the central 'T' pillar.
elements.details: Its visible face shows a gradient from teal to a darker teal.

elements.description: A cluster of four small isometric blue cubes arranged in a cross shape, extending from the top of the central structure.
elements.details: Each cube shows bright, medium, and dark blue faces, indicating light source from top-left.

elements.description: A small isometric blue cube extending downwards and left from the main structure's bottom-left connection point.
elements.details: Shows bright, medium, and dark blue faces.

elements.description: A small isometric blue cube extending downwards and right from the main structure's bottom-right connection point.
elements.details: Shows bright, medium, and dark blue faces.

elements.description: A thin, wavy line with two small circular dots at its ends, in green and teal colors.
elements.details: Emanates from the top-left area of the central structure.

elements.description: A thin, wavy line with two small circular dots at its ends, in orange and pink colors.
elements.details: Emanates from the top-right area of the central structure.

elements.description: A thin, wavy line with three small circular dots at its ends and along its path, in blue and teal colors.
elements.details: Emanates from the bottom-left area of the central structure.

elements.description: A thin, wavy line with two small circular dots at its ends, in orange and pink colors.
elements.details: Emanates from the bottom-right area of the central structure.

elements.description: A very small, thin, solitary wavy line in a teal color.
elements.details: Located near the bottom-left corner of the image, detached from the main structure.
